what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that registers an image asset named Video_Gold under the design-assets channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
Fields: id att-dba1d445, channel design-assets, attachment_type images, target image://design-assets/icons/Video_Gold, added 2026-06-22T12:26:24.539180+00:00
The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to icons/Video_Gold
No code symbols or executable content
standouts: Target asset is addressed by a custom image:// URI scheme
Attachment is typed as images and scoped to the design-assets channel
Record is purely metadata with a precise UTC timestamp
concerns: Target URI lacks file extension or MIME hint
No uploader, author, or provenance metadata
No dimensions, size, alt text, or version information
Empty body provides no additional context
notes: A minimal, timestamped ledger entry that links the design-assets channel to a Video_Gold icon via an image:// URI.
questions: What UI or feature is the Video_Gold icon intended for?
What file format and resolution does the target resolve to?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Is image://design-assets/icons/Video_Gold resolvable by the current system?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears designed to record an image attachment for a channel; it does exactly that, though it states no higher-level purpose beyond registration.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to create a discoverable, auditable record that ties a design asset to a specific channel so tools or people can locate and reference it.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme for addressing design assets is a notable convention.
contribution: This file contributes a concrete attachment record that maps a unique attachment id to a channel, attachment type, and asset target, supporting asset discovery and provenance tracking within the channel-memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata record in company/channel-memory/channel_attachments/att-dba1d445.md registers an images attachment for the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/Video_Gold with a UTC timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record and make retrievable a Video_Gold icon asset attached to the design-assets channel.
